arts.ttl: Feyenoord vs. Bayern Munich: 2024/25 Champions League full coverage
arts.sum: In their last Champions League match, Bayern Munich dispatched FC Shakhtar Donetsk 5-1, while Feyenoord downed Sparta Prague 4-2. Entering this matchday, Bayern Munich ranks 9th in the new-style table, while Feyenoord ranks 18th.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich keeping tabs on Valencia’s Cristhian Mosquera, Sporting CP’s Ousmane Diomande
arts.sum: Bayern Munich is in the midst of a number of important contract situation, so let’s talk about them on the Bavarian Podcast Works Show! Bayern Munich ’s starting center-backs, Dayot Upamecano and Kim Min-jae, need understudies because they’re doing most of the defensive dirty work and might wear themselves out.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich exec Max Eberl downplays Mathys Tel, Christopher Nkunku transfer rumors
arts.sum: Bayern Munich is in the midst of a number of important contract situation, so let’s talk about them on the Bavarian Podcast Works Show! On the topic of a Christopher Nkunku transfer: “We’re extremely happy with our squad,” Eberl added simply.

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich believe they are in the final stages of extending Alphonso Davies to a 5-year, €15 million per year deal
arts.sum: Bayern Munich had a well reported breakthrough with Alphonso Davies on Friday, January 17th, which left only details to be clarified on a new long term contract to renew his old one, which runs out in the summer of 2025. Bayern now believe they’re in the final stages to extend Alphonso Davies’ contract.
